name: Mortal Blitz VR - Escape The Darkness (Episode 1)

reviews.review_description: This difficulty is way too high, even on the easiest mode. Replaying the first half of the first level over and over is not fun. It's boring and tedious.
This game dont work!!!  It is crashed

Motion Controller Support and a free way to move make the game better. 
Open World is the Future on gear vr!
Even for a on rail game this is one of the worst experience on gear vr.

Great potential and graphics, but you have to restart a level from the very beginning whenever you die. Takes forever to pass. Plus, you can't move forward on your own. Restricted to paths. Has potential but only two stars for now.
I paid 10 dollars for this game meaning 1 hour of work and I cant even get pass the tittle.
Mine crashes on S7E ever since Nougat update. This game needs updated.

developer_response.body:
Sorry for the late response, the problem has been solved with a patch. 
Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I just bought it snd it doesnt let me play

I have edited my review from 5 star. The game still works sometimes for me.  Crashed occasionally at title screen. It's slow movement makes dying painful. I felt there should be a check point or skip in movement should player already passed that area before.
Awesome game especially in a swivel chair.

This shooter on rails is hampered by 2 things: #1 it is ridiculously hard with no checkpoints, spent over an hour and couldn't get past level one. Now, I don't mind a bit of a challenge, but what I do mind is #2 - having to start from the beginning and watch all the lame dialogue and tutorials each time because the "skip" option is so slow you might as well let them play through,. Very NOT fun. I suspect this game is quite short and these flaws are intentional to stretch game time. Save yourself the aggravation!

Over all very good game. First problem why is it so freaking hard? The first level is close to impossible! I can get past it played for hours. The most annoying thing in this game not enough check points so if you die you can just start close to where you left off. The second biggest issue is you can't skip the stupid dialogue. You have to go through the motions every time you die you can only kinda skip it. Gets old having to hear the same audio recording of a uninspired voice actor over and over again. If they manage to fix this they have a great game.

I wish I could give this a legitimate review but Oculus refuses to allow me to install it. Everytime I try it shows that the game needs an update, even though no update is available. And on Oculus you aren't allowed to play games that need an update. Therefore the game is currently unplayable :(

reviews.review_title: Crashes every time I open it
reviews.review_description: Game won't even start.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the late response, the problem has been solved with a patch. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: If you gonna take my money either fix the game so it starts or give me a sloppy blow job for $10.
Sooooooo bad
We want more episodes!!
Think house of the dead in space. Move from spot to spot. Kill. Kill. Kill.  Alot of fun in that arcade kinda way.  Not something to pay for hours on end. But a great time in bursts. Glad I purchased
FANTASTIC FPS!!! Well worth the 9.99 price tag.. if your a Shooter fan,, GET THIS GAME!!!!
